company.name: Boundless Bio
company.subtitle: Post pipeline reshape · BBI-940 kinesin degrader KOMODO-1 Phase 1 starting H1 2026 · Trading below cash ($1.08 vs $4.46 CPS)
company.cashRunway: Into 2H 2028 (~$100M cash, ~$5M monthly burn post POTENTIATE discontinuation)

assets.name: BBI-940 — Kinesin degrader (ER+/HER2- breast cancer)
assets.stage: IND accepted Jan 2026 · Phase 1 KOMODO-1 starting H1 2026

market.notes: ER+/HER2- metastatic breast cancer is largest BC subtype (~60% of mBC). Oncogene-amplified subset (MYC, CCND1, FGFR1, CDK6) = ~20-30% of cases. Post-CDK4/6 + endocrine resistant 3L+ setting. BBI-940 is oral kinesin degrader targeting ecDNA segregation during mitosis — novel mechanism with preclinical single-agent xenograft regressions. First ecDNA-directed therapy to reach clinic. KOMODO-1 enrolls ER+/HER2- AND TNBC LAR subtype in parallel. Initial PoC data expected within runway (into 2H 2028).

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~310K breast/yr; HR+/HER2- ~68% = ~210K incident, ~400K prevalent on-tx including adjuvant ET. Source: NCI SEER 2024.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~240K HR+/HER2- incident; ~450K prevalent on ET +/- CDK4/6. EUROCARE-6 + ESMO 2024 data.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~550K on-tx; China NCC + Japan NCR report HR+/HER2- ~70% of breast mix.

us.wtpPct.note: ~75% -- CDK4/6i (Ibrance/Verzenio/Kisqali) NCCN Cat 1 1L; Medicare Part D + commercial broad; adj Verzenio approved 2021.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- NICE + G-BA approved all 3 CDK4/6i; France ASMR III-IV; AI/fulvestrant generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~20% -- Japan J-DPC + China NRDL cover CDK4/6i; EM AI generics dominant (letrozole, anastrozole).

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: CDK4/6i $160K (40% pts) + Trodelvy/Enhertu-low $180K (8%) + AI+fulvestrant $15K (40%) + Orserdu $220K (5%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% of US list; generic AI floor keeps blend low.

row.priceK.note: ~$20K blended; AI generics <$2K/yr dominate outside developed APAC.

penPct.note: ~58% peak -- CDK4/6i saturated 1L MBC; adj penetration growing 5yr; ESR1-mut Orserdu + ADCs expand late line.

us.reachPct.note: BBI-940 CHK1i in ecDNA-amp HR+/HER2- MBC; ~20K US patients with CCNE1/MYC amp post-CDK4/6i; POTENTIATE Ph1/2 2025; launch 2029 ~15% reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$185K/yr projected; biomarker-selected oral CHK1i, anchor to capivasertib $205K + Piqray $185K.

us.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- first ecDNA-directed Rx; biomarker assay (ECHO) companion dx; NCCN Cat 2B expected for amp-selected.

eu.reachPct.note: ~12% EU5; EMA biomarker-selected precedent; NICE/G-BA ecDNA assay novel.

row.reachPct.note: <8% ROW; Japan PMDA biomarker onc broad; China NGS adoption growing.

assets.name: BBI-940 — Kinesin degrader (TNBC LAR subtype)
assets.stage: IND accepted Jan 2026 · Phase 1 KOMODO-1 starting H1 2026

indications.name: TNBC luminal androgen receptor subtype with oncogene amplifications

market.notes: TNBC LAR is ~10-15% of TNBC — androgen-receptor-driven subtype with distinct biology from basal-like TNBC. Oncogene-amplified subset of LAR = smaller population but very high unmet need given ADC/CPI limited benefit in this segment. BBI-940 preclinical regressions in xenografts with ecDNA amplifications. KOMODO-1 dose escalation enrolls LAR arm in parallel with ER+/HER2-.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: TNBC ~15% of breast = ~45K incident/yr, ~60K prevalent on-tx (short OS limits prevalence). Source: NCI SEER, TNBC Foundation.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 TNBC ~52K incident; ~65K prevalent. EUROCARE + ESMO TNBC consortium.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~120K on-tx; TNBC over-represented in AA/African and younger cohorts per GLOBOCAN.

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- Keytruda+chemo (KEYNOTE-522) neoadj SOC; Trodelvy 2L+ NCCN Cat 1; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE approved Keytruda neoadj 2022, Trodelvy 2L 2023; G-BA betraechtlich for both.

row.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- Japan PMDA full reimb; China NRDL pembro 2023; EM rely on chemo (AC-T).

us.priceK.note: Blended $140K: Keytruda+chemo $180K (40% pts) + Trodelvy $155K (25%) + chemo alone $25K (30%) + Talzenna/PARPi $180K (5%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$80K blended; EU net ~57% US list; neoadj pembro course-limited lowers cost vs metastatic.

penPct.note: ~55% peak -- IO+chemo neoadj penetrated 70%+ eligible; Trodelvy 2L standard; Datroway (TROP2) + PARPi extend.

us.reachPct.note: BBI-940 ecDNA-amp TNBC LAR/MYC-amp; ~15K US TNBC, ~30% ecDNA+; Ph1/2 POTENTIATE expansion; launch 2030 ~12% reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$180K/yr projected; anchor to Trodelvy $155K + targeted oncology orals.

us.wtpPct.note: ~40% -- TNBC high unmet post-Trodelvy/Keytruda; ecDNA biomarker assay adoption gate.

eu.reachPct.note: ~10% EU5 TNBC ecDNA+; NICE TNBC restrictive post-Trodelvy.

row.reachPct.note: <6% ROW; Japan NHI TNBC targeted; China NGS TNBC early.

mega_bear.narrative: BBI-940 fails Phase 1 — kinesin mechanism doesn't translate — company winds down or reverse merger
events: ✗ KOMODO-1 Phase 1 safety/tolerability issue halts escalation
✗ No single-agent activity signal in either breast cancer subtype
✗ Kinesin degrader mechanism invalidated — ecDNA thesis broken
→ Board elects wind-down or reverse merger, residual cash returned at ~$3/share

bear.narrative: BBI-940 shows limited signal — company muddles through cash, dilutes at bad terms
events: ~ KOMODO-1 shows safety but minimal single-agent activity
✗ ER+/HER2- arm shows no objective responses
~ TNBC LAR arm shows modest signal — subset biomarker emerges
→ Forced dilution at $0.50-1 to extend runway to Phase 2

base.narrative: KOMODO-1 Phase 1 shows PoC signal — stock re-rates from below-cash to pipeline value
events: ✓ BBI-940 Phase 1 dose escalation completes, RP2D identified
✓ Single-agent partial responses in oncogene-amplified patients (ORR ~15-25%)
~ ecDNA mechanism validated in humans — biomarker enrichment works
→ Stock re-rates to $4-5 (cash + modest pipeline NPV)

bull.narrative: BBI-940 shows strong PoC — ecDNA platform validated — partnership or expansion trial
events: ✓ KOMODO-1 ORR >25% in oncogene-amplified patients across both subtypes
✓ ECHO companion diagnostic validated — clean biomarker strategy
✓ Partnership announced with major oncology player for platform expansion
✓ Spyglass platform spawns second clinical program

psychedelic_bull.narrative: ecDNA-directed therapy becomes a new oncology pillar — BBI-940 transformative — Big Pharma acquires
events: ✓ KOMODO-1 shows deep responses including CRs in heavily pretreated patients
✓ ecDNA amplification becomes validated target class — 17% of all solid tumors
✓ Platform extends to colorectal, gastric, NSCLC amplified tumors
✓ AstraZeneca or Daiichi acquires for $500M-1B to own ecDNA franchise

lastData.title: Pipeline reshape — BBI-940 IND accepted, POTENTIATE terminated
points: Jan 20, 2026: FDA accepted IND for BBI-940 (novel Kinesin oral degrader)
Jan 20, 2026: Discontinued POTENTIATE Phase 1/2 trial (BBI-355 CHK1 + BBI-825 RNR combo)
Pipeline now single-asset on BBI-940 — both legacy molecules shelved
KOMODO-1 Phase 1 in metastatic breast cancer expected H1 2026 start
Enrolls ER+/HER2- AND TNBC LAR subtype in parallel dose escalation
Preclinical single-agent tumor regressions in xenograft models
Q3 2025 cash: $117.6M; runway extended into 2H 2028 post reshape
Stock trading at ~$1.08 vs ~$4.46 cash per share — 76% discount to cash

nextCatalyst.title: KOMODO-1 Phase 1 first patient dosed (BBI-940 in mBC)
thresholds: Trial initiation in metastatic breast cancer
Two subtypes in parallel: ER+/HER2- and TNBC LAR
ECHO diagnostic used for patient selection (ecDNA amplification)
Preclinical xenograft regressions set efficacy bar
First clinical validation of kinesin degrader mechanism and ecDNA thesis

risks: Trading below cash ($1.08 vs $4.46 CPS) — market prices pipeline at negative value
Single-asset company after POTENTIATE termination — BBI-940 is everything
Kinesin degrader mechanism is unprecedented — no clinical validation of class
Preclinical xenograft activity is weak Phase 1 predictor in oncology
Phase 1 in heavily pretreated mBC — hard patient population for any signal
KOMODO-1 PoC data not expected until late 2027-2028 — long wait
Microcap liquidity — 22M shares, ~$150K daily volume, high slippage
BBI-355 and BBI-825 termination signals prior program failures — management credibility questioned
ATM capacity $14.5M available — dilution likely at sub-$1 prices would be catastrophic
Guggenheim moved to Hold (Mar 2026) — analyst coverage deteriorating
Shares at $1.08 near 52-week low — institutional delisting risk if below $1 for 30+ days
ecDNA thesis requires companion diagnostic adoption — complex commercial path
No upcoming binary catalyst in 2026 — pure waiting game on trial enrollment

catalysts.title: KOMODO-1 Phase 1 first patient dosed (ER+/HER2- mBC)
KOMODO-1 Phase 1 first patient dosed (TNBC LAR)
